message:
feat: add telemetry bridge E2E verification stage outputs (bd-1now.4.6)

Adds per-scenario stage output artifacts from the telemetry bridge E2E
verification suite. These outputs record the raw test results for each
verification scenario exercised by the owned-worker telemetry bridge:

- normal_lifecycle.txt: standard start → accept → persist → stop flow
- multi_conn.txt: concurrent connection admission and reader isolation
- multi_event.txt: burst ingestion through bounded admission queue
- backpressure.txt: queue-full shedding under sustained overload
- oversized_reject.txt: MAX_EVENT_BYTES enforcement on line-framed reads
- stale_recovery.txt: bridge recovery after stale socket file detection
- abnormal_exit.txt: reader thread error propagation and bridge teardown
- transitions.txt: IDLE→RUNNING→DRAINING→STOPPED state machine coverage
- event_fields.txt: TelemetryBridgeEvent structured field validation
- key_format.txt: FrankensqliteAdapter audit-log key generation format
- worker_cleanup.txt: persistence owner drain and thread join behavior
- unit_test_output.txt: in-crate unit test output capture
- clippy_output.txt: clippy lint pass for telemetry_bridge module

These complement the already-tracked top-level E2E summary and log files
in bd-1now.4.6/ with the detailed per-scenario evidence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
